{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Legislature passed Senate Bill 867, a climate bond known as the Safe Drinking Water, Wildfire Prevention, Drought Preparedness, and Clean Air Bond Act of 2024.",
    "The Safe Drinking Water, Wildfire Prevention, Drought Preparedness, and Clean Air Bond Act of 2024 authorizes a $10 billion general obligation bond to finance projects related to climate resilience.",
    "$1.5 billion is allocated for wildfire and forest resilience within the climate bond.",
    "$450 million is designated for extreme heat mitigation in the climate bond.",
    "$1.2 billion is allocated for sea-level rise and coastal resilience in the climate bond.",
    "$300 million is allocated for climate-resilient farms, ranches, and working lands within the climate bond.",
    "$850 million is dedicated to cleaner air through reliable clean energy solutions in the climate bond.",
    "The California Public Education Facilities Bond will allocate $10 billion for repairs and upgrades to K-12 and community college infrastructure across California.",
    "$8.5 billion of the education bond is for upgrading the infrastructure of K-12 schools."
